# Generated DOCX fixture corpus

All documents here are synthetic and generated by `scripts/generate-docx-fixtures.mjs`.
They contain no private or copyrighted source material. Run `pnpm fixtures:generate`
to reproduce the committed binaries and structural manifests.

`corpus.json` is the requirements-to-fixture matrix. Large entry-count and
expanded-size security cases are generated in memory by tests rather than stored
in Git. Fixture timestamps, ZIP entry ordering, compression, and content are fixed
so regeneration is byte-for-byte deterministic.
